texto: Opera purges men of those hesitations and worries which make it difficult for them to acknowledge their importance to themselves. A good performance of an opera that is provides a language for us to speak of ourselves as we have always known we should speak.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Hamish Swanston sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Opera purges men of those hesitations and worries which make it difficult for them to acknowledge…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, music, opera, útil em momentos de reflexao.
